manifest.author: Federico "Edo" Granata
manifest.description: This is a plugin for Obsidian. This plugin syncs highlights and notes taken in KOReader.
manifest.name: KOReader Highlights

releases.author: Edo78
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feature/edit detection by @Edo78 in https://github.com/Edo78/obsidian-koreader-sync/pull/50


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Edo78/obsidian-koreader-sync/compare/0.5.0...0.6.0

releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Edo78/obsidian-koreader-sync/compare/0.4.1...0.5.0

releases.author: Edo78
releases.description:
This release set some default for titles of notes and books.
Right now the title of a note can be of max 5 words (if longer will be truncated and '...' added). The titles of the books have the same limit but they have a prefix `(book) `.

In a future version an interface will be added to customize:

- prefix
- suffix
- maxLenght
- maxWords

releases.author: Edo78
releases.description:
### BREAKING CHANGES
To avoid future duplication of notes a unique ID is now added to each note and since the old ones do not have it the plug-in cannot "see" them and they will be duplicated.

ALL old notes **must be removed**.

I am terribly sorry for the inconvenience.

releases.author: Edo78
releases.description: This is a first release to let the plugin be installable directly in Obsidian
